base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brinstar_mellow_drift — a character from 1986 metroid. Mellow — bee/wasp swarm. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Mellow — bee/wasp swarm; drifts in swarm
